<?php declare(strict_types=1); /** * This file is part of phpDocumentor. * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. * * @link http://phpdoc.org */ namespace phpDocumentor\Reflection\DocBlock\Tags; use Doctrine\Deprecations\Deprecation; use phpDocumentor\Reflection\DocBlock\Description; use phpDocumentor\Reflection\DocBlock\Tag; use phpDocumentor\Reflection\Type; /** * Reflection class for a {@}implements tag in a Docblock. */ class Implements_ extends TagWithType { public function __construct(Type $type, ?Description $description = null) { $this->name = 'implements'; $this->type = $type; $this->description = $description; } /** * @deprecated Create using static factory is deprecated, * this method should not be called directly by library consumers */ public static function create(string $body): ?Tag { Deprecation::trigger( 'phpdocumentor/reflection-docblock', 'https://github.com/phpDocumentor/ReflectionDocBlock/issues/361', 'Create using static factory is deprecated, this method should not be called directly by library consumers', ); return null; } }
